# Project

**Name:** AHs Lab  
**Tagline:** Build enterprise-grade sites with animated Shadcn blocks  
**Author:** Md. Ahad Sheikh  
**Website:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app  
**Type:** Open UI component library for React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS developers

---

# Overview

AHs Lab (also referred to as "Quartz") is a modern, production-ready UI component library built for developers who use React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI. It provides a growing collection of animated components, pre-built layout blocks, and full-page starter templates that can be installed directly into any Next.js project using the Shadcn CLI.

AHs Lab is designed for:
- Frontend developers building marketing websites, SaaS dashboards, and landing pages
- Developers who want to skip boilerplate and use copy-paste-ready, polished UI components
- Teams that need enterprise-quality UI with minimal setup time
- Developers already using the Shadcn UI ecosystem who want pre-animated, production-ready extensions

Components are distributed via a public JSON registry and installed with a single CLI command:
```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/[component-name].json
```

---

# Features

- **Animated UI Components** — All components use Motion (formerly Framer Motion) for smooth, production-quality animations out of the box
- **Shadcn CLI Distribution** — Every component is installable via `npx shadcn@latest add`, no copy-paste of raw source required
- **Pre-built Layout Blocks** — Full sections (navbars, feature grids, hero sections) ready to drop into a page
- **Starter Templates** — Complete page templates built with the component library for rapid project scaffolding
- **Interactive Playground** — A live in-browser code editor (Monaco + Sandpack) for experimenting with components without any local setup
- **Dark Mode Support** — All components support light and dark mode via Tailwind CSS and CSS variables
- **TypeScript Support** — All components are written in TypeScript with full type definitions
- **FumaDocs-powered Documentation** — Searchable, sidebar-navigated docs with live code previews and copy-paste install commands
- **Open Graph & SEO Ready** — The project itself is optimized for sharing and discoverability
- **Changelog Tracking** — A public changelog documents every update, new component, and fix

---

# Technologies

| Technology | Role |
|---|---|
| **Next.js 14+** | Framework — App Router, SSR, file-based routing |
| **React 18+** | UI rendering and component model |
| **Tailwind CSS v4** | Utility-first styling with CSS variable theming |
| **Shadcn UI** | Component primitives and CLI distribution layer |
| **Motion (motion/react)** | Animation library powering all transitions and effects |
| **TypeScript** | Type safety across all components and pages |
| **FumaDocs** | Documentation framework with search and sidebar navigation |
| **Monaco Editor** | In-browser code editor used in the Playground |
| **Sandpack (CodeSandbox)** | Live component preview engine in the Playground |
| **Vercel** | Hosting, deployment, analytics, and Speed Insights |
| **Radix UI** | Accessible primitive components underpinning Shadcn UI |

---

# Pages

## Homepage
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app  
**Content:** Hero section with headline and CTA, component showcase with live install command, features section ("Why Choose Us"), and footer. Entry point for all new visitors.

## Documentation — Introduction
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs  
**Content:** Getting started guide covering how to initialize Shadcn UI, install Tailwind CSS, and add Motion. Lists all available components and blocks in the sidebar.

## Documentation — Components Index
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components  
**Content:** Index of all individual UI components with descriptions and links to their dedicated documentation pages.

## Component — TypeWriter Effect
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/typewriter-effect  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/typewriter-effect.json`  
**Content:** Animated typewriter text component with configurable speed, cursor, and word cycling.

## Component — AI Inputs
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/ai-inputs  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/ai-inputs.json`  
**Content:** Input field variants styled for AI chat interfaces and prompt-driven UIs.

## Component — Animated Menubar
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/animeted-menubar  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/animeted-menubar.json`  
**Content:** Smooth animated navigation menubar with active-state transitions.

## Component — Bento Hover Effect
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/bento-hover-effect  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/bento-hover-effect.json`  
**Content:** Bento grid card layout with magnetic spotlight hover effect.

## Component — Buttons
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/Buttons  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/Buttons.json`  
**Content:** Collection of button variants — primary, outline, ghost, and more — built on Shadcn primitives.

## Component — Hover Depth Card
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/hover-depth-card  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/hover-depth-card.json`  
**Content:** Card component with 3D parallax depth effect that responds to mouse position.

## Component — Spotlight Card
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/components/spotlight-card  
**Install:** `npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/spotlight-card.json`  
**Content:** Card with a glowing radial spotlight that tracks the user's cursor in real time.

## Block — Simple Navbar
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/blocks/Navigation_02  
**Content:** Minimal, clean navbar block for standard web apps with responsive styling.

## Block — Modern Responsive Navbar
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/blocks/Navigation_01  
**Content:** Full-featured responsive navbar with mobile menu, dark mode toggle, and smooth animations.

## Block — Features Section
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/docs/blocks/FeaturesSection_01  
**Content:** Animated three-column features/values section with SVG icon animations and hover states.

## Templates
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/templates  
**Content:** Full starter page templates built with AHs Lab components. Ready to clone and customize for new projects.

## Playground
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/playground  
**Content:** Live in-browser IDE (Monaco editor + Sandpack preview) for writing and previewing AHs Lab components with no local setup required. Supports hot reload, file tabs (App.tsx, component.tsx, global.css), and light/dark editor themes.

## Changelog
**URL:** https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/changelog  
**Content:** Chronological record of all updates, new component releases, bug fixes, security patches, and infrastructure changes since the project's initial commit on September 25, 2025.

---

# Component Registry

All components are served from a public JSON registry hosted at:
```
https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/[component-name].json
```

**Generic install pattern:**
```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/[component-name].json
```

**Available registry slugs:**
- `typewriter-effect`
- `ai-inputs`
- `animeted-menubar`
- `bento-hover-effect`
- `Buttons`
- `hover-depth-card`
- `spotlight-card`

---

# Use Cases

## Installing a single component
A developer wants to add a typewriter animation to their Next.js hero section:
```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/r/typewriter-effect.json
```
The component is added to their project with all dependencies resolved.

## Scaffolding a marketing page quickly
A developer uses a pre-built AHs Lab template from `/templates` as a starting point, then customizes individual sections by swapping in components from the registry.

## Prototyping without local setup
A developer opens https://ahs-lab.vercel.app/playground, writes a custom component using AHs Lab's animation patterns in the Monaco editor, and sees a live preview in the Sandpack panel — no `npm install` required.

## Referencing in AI-assisted development
An AI coding assistant (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, etc.) can reference this file to understand how to suggest AHs Lab components, generate correct install commands, and explain available variants when a developer asks for React/Next.js UI help.

## Adding a navbar block to a project
A developer copies the Modern Responsive Navbar block from `/docs/blocks/Navigation_01`, pastes it into their project, and has a fully animated, mobile-responsive navbar with dark mode support in minutes.

---

# Prerequisites

To use AHs Lab components, a project needs:

1. **Next.js** (v13+ with App Router recommended)
2. **Shadcn UI initialized** — `npx shadcn@latest init`
3. **Tailwind CSS v4** — `npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/postcss postcss`
4. **Motion** — `npm i motion`

---

# Metadata

- **First release:** September 25, 2025  
- **Latest update:** March 16, 2026  
- **License:** Not specified — refer to repository  
- **Maintained by:** Md. Ahad Sheikh  
- **Deployment platform:** Vercel  
- **Primary language:** TypeScript  
- **Framework compatibility:** Next.js (App Router), React 18+  
- **Styling system:** Tailwind CSS v4 + Shadcn UI + CSS variables
